framework.name: WIMSE reuse for agent identity management
framework.description: The draft explicitly references WIMSE (Workload Identity in Multi-System Environments) and a companion draft (draft-ni-wimse-ai-agent-identity-01) discussing WIMSE applicability to agentic AI. This links the SPIFFE/workload identity world to AI agent authentication.
framework.raw_quote: From the identity management perspective, we recommend reusing IETF works like WIMSE. This draft [I-D.draft-ni-wimse-ai-agent-identity-01] discusses WIMSE applicability to Agentic AI.
